name: DAO-WARDEN
description: An autonomous DAO guardian agent. It detects BONK-class governance attacks: buying a voting majority behind a treasury-draining proposal, at low quorum and with no timelock (abuse of a legitimate mechanism, not a code exploit). It combines deterministic calldata risk scoring with an LLM layer (Claude Haiku) that compares a proposal's narrative against its real action. On detecting an attack it votes NO with the power delegated by honest, apathetic holders.

services.name: guardian
services.description: The guarded DAOGovernor contract on Arc Testnet
